privileged_info_summary: All task metadata is verified and consistent across files. The renew_prescription task targets a patient named Maria Garcia and involves renewing a Metformin prescription. The target quantity is 90 units and target repeats is 3. The task uses a local OSCAR EMR instance running at http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp with test credentials (username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117). The patient data and credentials are synthetic/fabricated for this lab environment. OSCAR is a real, open-source Canadian electronic medical record system.
